metadata.name: Process a Lost Policy Finder Request

description: A person believes their deceased relative had a life insurance policy with the company but cannot find it.

nodes.task_description: Collect the deceased person's information (full name, date of birth, SSN).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the information needed to search the system.

nodes.task_description: Search the policy administration system for any policies under the deceased's name.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs a search and finds an active policy.

nodes.task_description: If a policy is found, inform the caller and begin the standard claim process, starting with verifying they are a beneficiary.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the caller that a policy was found and proceeds to the first step of the claims process.
